# ChemSus Technologies Pvt Ltd

> Sustainable specialty chemicals from renewable lignocellulosic biomass — made in India.

ChemSus Technologies Pvt Ltd is an Indian startup producing high-purity biomass-derived platform chemicals for pharmaceutical, agricultural, cosmetic, and industrial applications. All chemicals are produced from renewable lignocellulosic feedstocks (rice straw, sugarcane bagasse, wood chips) using green chemistry processes.

## Company

- **Legal Name:** ChemSus Technologies Pvt Ltd
- **Website:** https://chemsus.in
- **Email:** info@chemsus.in
- **Phone:** +91 84868 77575
- **Registered Office:** House No. 555, GNB Road, North Guwahati, Assam – 781030, India
- **Branch Office:** Gavara Jaggayyapalem, BHPV, Visakhapatnam – 530012, Andhra Pradesh, India

## Products

ChemSus supplies the following high-purity chemicals for R&D and industrial use in India:

### Levulinic Acid (CAS 123-76-2)
- Molecular Formula: C5H8O3 | MW: 116.12 g/mol
- IUPAC: 4-oxopentanoic acid
- Uses: precursor to 5-ALA herbicide, bioplasticizers, gamma-valerolactone (GVL), skin-conditioning in cosmetics, pharmaceuticals
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/levulinic-acid.html

### 5-Hydroxymethylfurfural / 5-HMF (CAS 67-47-0)
- Molecular Formula: C6H6O3 | MW: 126.11 g/mol
- IUPAC: (5-hydroxymethyl)furan-2-carbaldehyde
- Uses: precursor to FDCA for bio-PEF plastic, specialty polymers, pharmaceuticals, antifungal agents
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/5-hmf.html

### 5-Aminolevulinic Acid Hydrochloride (CAS 5451-09-2)
- Molecular Formula: C5H10ClNO3 | MW: 167.59 g/mol
- IUPAC: 5-amino-4-oxopentanoic acid hydrochloride
- Uses: photodynamic therapy (PDT), oncology API (photosensitiser prodrug), biodegradable herbicide, plant growth regulator, porphyrin biosynthesis
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/dala.html

### Sodium Levulinate (CAS 19856-23-6)
- Molecular Formula: C5H7NaO3 | MW: 138.10 g/mol
- IUPAC: sodium 4-oxopentanoate
- Uses: cosmetic preservative booster, food flavour enhancer, skin-conditioning agent, pharmaceutical excipient
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/sodium-levulinate.html

### Calcium Levulinate Dihydrate (CAS 5743-49-7)
- Molecular Formula: C10H14CaO6·2H2O | MW: 306.32 g/mol
- IUPAC: calcium bis(4-oxopentanoate) dihydrate
- Uses: pharmaceutical calcium supplement (injectable), food calcium fortification, nutraceuticals, veterinary medicine
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/calcium-levulinate.html

### Ethyl Levulinate (CAS 539-88-8)
- Molecular Formula: C7H12O3 | MW: 144.17 g/mol
- IUPAC: ethyl 4-oxopentanoate
- Uses: fragrance (fruity notes), biodiesel additive, green solvent, chemical intermediate
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/ethyl-levulinate.html

### Methyl Levulinate (CAS 624-45-3)
- Molecular Formula: C6H10O3 | MW: 130.14 g/mol
- IUPAC: methyl 4-oxopentanoate
- Uses: green solvent, plasticizer, fragrance, fuel additive, chemical intermediate for GVL
- Page: https://chemsus.in/products/methyl-levulinate.html

## About the Technology

ChemSus uses acid-catalysed hydrolysis and dehydration of cellulosic biomass to produce platform chemicals. This approach upcycles agricultural waste (rice straw, sugarcane bagasse) into high-value specialty chemicals, replacing petroleum feedstocks with renewable alternatives. The process is aligned with green chemistry principles: atom economy, renewable feedstocks, biodegradable products.
